name: Air / Solo - Screen Set
summary: While metal screens may be an option, they can compromise the smoothness and taste of your botanicals.
description: While metal screens may be an option, they can compromise the smoothness and taste of your botanicals. Our Glass Aroma Tubes come with an integrated glass screen for unparalleled vapour purity and flavour. For optimal results, we suggest using whole or coarsely ground botanicals without a metal screen. This set contains 6 Stainless Steel Filter Screens for the Arizer Solo 3, Solo 2 Max, Air Max, Air SE, or Solo 2 vaporiser. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
